subject: FW: Andy Valmorbida presents Brendan Murphy Exhibition, Dec 13th
body:
From: ironclad33@hotmail.com [mailto:ironclad33@hotmail.com] On Behalf
Of brendan murphy
Sent: Thursday, November 29, 2007 3:43 PM
To: ironclad33@hotmail.com
Subject: Andy Valmorbida presents Brendan Murphy Exhibition, Dec 13th

 

Hi,

I hope this message finds you well.
 
I am excited to announce my first show together with my new dealer Andy
Valmorbida. Andy has made a name for himself, producing some of the
biggest, and most interesting art exhibitions in the world. 
 
Together we have plans to do three shows next year as well (Los Angeles,
London, Melbourne)!
 
I cant wait for you to see the new work! Together with the help of my
assistants and a couple of key people, I feel as though I have really
broken through with this series of paintings. (I will show some really
cool abstract pieces in which I incoporate Swarovski crystals together
with a powerful color pallete).
 
So, I wanted to personally invite you to join me for an exhibition for
my new paintings on Thursday, Dec 13th.

Where: 30 east 71st street
When: Thursday, December 13th , 6p.m. - 11 p.m.
RSVP: info@Valmorbida.net <mailto:info@Valmorbida.net> 
(Evite attatched)
 
Try to RSVP because its going to be very busy at the door.

Its going to be a lot of fun, I look forward to seeing you!

Happy Holidays!
 
Brendan



________________________________

2007>
body_html:
From: ironclad33@hotmail.com [mailto:ironclad33@hotmail.com] On Behalf Of brendan murphy
Sent: Thursday, November 29, 2007 3:43 PM
To: ironclad33@hotmail.com
Subject: Andy Valmorbida presents Brendan Murphy Exhibition, Dec 13th

 

Hi,

I hope this message finds you well.
 
I am excited to announce my first show together with my new dealer Andy Valmorbida. Andy has made a name for himself, producing some of the biggest, and most interesting art exhibitions in the world.
 
Together we have plans to do three shows next year as well (Los Angeles, London, Melbourne)!
 
I cant wait for you to see the new work! Together with the help of my assistants and a couple of key people, I feel as though I have really broken through with this series of paintings. (I will show some really cool abstract pieces in which I incoporate Swarovski crystals together with a powerful color pallete).
 
So, I wanted to personally invite you to join me for an exhibition for my new paintings on Thursday, Dec 13th.

Where: 30 east 71st street
When: Thursday, December 13th , 6p.m. - 11 p.m.
RSVP: info@Valmorbida.net
(Evite attatched)
 
Try to RSVP because its going to be very busy at the door.

Its going to be a lot of fun, I look forward to seeing you!

Happy Holidays!
 
Brendan
